title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Whirlpool India Advisory Limited in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!
